creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Oleg,

Sorry for the delay.

I tried it and encountered some leftovers[1] with it. I've made some
changes[2] to the diff you originally provided, basically some license stuff,
and adding a missed file.

Any ideas about them ?

References:
[1]  https://redports.org/~ashish/20140109132529-62293-168217/xpi-pencil-2.0.5.log
[2]  http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/diffs/xpi-pencil-2.0-5_0.diff

Thanks
